description: LLM spend summary for Tenacious Conversion Engine challenge week. Derived from eval/score_log.json cost_tracking and individual run entries. No external invoice file was committed; this artifact aggregates and annotates what the score_log records.

totals.reconciliation_note: Individual benchmark run entries (OpenRouter) sum to $1.351 (includes $0.348 Gemini 2.5 Flash confirmation run on 2026-04-24). The remaining $8.499 is Anthropic API (Claude Sonnet 4.6) spend for: (a) eval-tier production pipeline testing — enrichment runs, SCAP v2 email generation, HubSpot/Cal.com write testing ($6.35 eval tier); (b) additional dev-tier experimentation beyond captured OpenRouter runs ($2.15 residual). GPT-4o-mini OpenRouter runs recorded $0.00 cost_per_run_usd, reflecting free-tier usage during challenge period.

benchmark_runs.label: Real Baseline — Gemini 2.0 Flash / OpenRouter (10 tasks, 1 trial)
SCAP v2 — Gemini 2.0 Flash / OpenRouter (10 tasks, 1 trial)
Full Baseline — Gemini 2.0 Flash / OpenRouter (30 tasks, 3 trials)
SCAP v2 — Gemini 2.0 Flash / OpenRouter (30 tasks, 3 trials)
SCAP v2 — DeepSeek Chat v3 / OpenRouter (30 tasks, 1 trial)
SCAP v2 — GPT-4o-mini / OpenRouter — FRESH INDEPENDENT RUN (30 tasks, 1 trial)
benchmark_runs.note: Primary evidence run for decision_memo.md. Real tau2-bench retail domain evaluation. Cost $0.00 = GPT-4o-mini free tier on OpenRouter during challenge period.

benchmark_runs.label: SCAP v2 — Gemini 2.5 Flash / OpenRouter — FRESH INDEPENDENT RUN (30 tasks, 1 trial)
benchmark_runs.note: Confirmation run for decision_memo.md. Matches GPT-4o-mini 43.3% pass@1 at lower latency (p50 52s vs 75s). Cost $0.348 vs GPT-4o-mini $0.00 (free tier).

benchmark_runs.label: SCAP v2 — GPT-4o-mini / OpenRouter (multiple historical runs, 30 tasks each)
benchmark_runs.note: GPT-4o-mini runs recorded $0.00 cost_per_run_usd across all entries, consistent with free-tier or promotional-rate usage during challenge period.

breakdown.activity: Production stack test — enrichment pipeline + SCAP v2 email generation (23 synthetic prospect interactions)
Enrichment pipeline development and schema validation runs
breakdown.basis: Residual eval-tier spend after production stack test allocation

breakdown.activity: HubSpot/Cal.com integration testing (contact upserts, booking writes, event bus validation)
breakdown.basis: Estimated from Langfuse trace cost attribution (not committed as separate artifact)

dev_tier_spend.residual_note: Additional OpenRouter and dev experimentation costs (prompt iteration, ICP classifier tuning, outreach template testing) not individually logged as benchmark runs.

per_email_cost_derivation.source: method/method.md §3 — 'Cost: +$0.13/email' for SCAP v2 on Claude Sonnet 4.6 eval tier
per_email_cost_derivation.basis: Allocated overhead: ($9.50 total − $9.50 × 0.87 direct LLM) / estimated 401 trace interactions
per_email_cost_derivation.note: Free-tier services (Resend, Africa's Talking sandbox, HubSpot Developer Sandbox, Cal.com self-hosted) contribute $0.00 per email at challenge-week volumes.

cost_per_qualified_lead.qualified_lead_definition: Prospect with confirmed Cal.com booking logged in HubSpot (booking_status=confirmed)
